query:
ALTER TABLE projects 
ADD COLUMN construtoraId INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN imagemCapaUrl TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN bookPdfUrl TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN linkMateriais TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN regiao VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN latitude DECIMAL(10, 8) NULL,
ADD COLUMN longitude DECIMAL(11, 8) NULL;
